data.content: Implementation review rejected: (1) CLAUDE.md and AGENTS.md have Code Style Constraints section removed — must remain. (2) eslint.config.mjs has max-lines/max-lines-per-function/max-len rules removed — must remain. (3) .claude/worktrees/** ignore pattern removed from eslint.config.mjs — unrelated change. (4) 17 files outside src/components/ modified (api routes, hooks, lib, stores, tests) — only the 14 listed component files should change. Scope: revert AGENTS.md, CLAUDE.md, eslint.config.mjs, and all non-src/components/ files. Only touch the listed dialog/settings component files.
